notableEvents.label: Shohei Ohtani pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Shohei Ohtani grounds out, shortstop Taylor Walls to first baseman Jonathan Aranda.

notableEvents.label: Max Muncy pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Max Muncy flies out to center fielder Cedric Mullins.

notableEvents.label: Jonathan Aranda GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jonathan Aranda grounds into a double play, first baseman Freddie Freeman to shortstop Mookie Betts to first baseman Freddie Freeman. Yandy Díaz out at 2nd. Jonathan Aranda out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Ben Williamson pinch-hit
